nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 森林砍伐是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括角蜂鸟、长尾妍蜂鸟、White-fronted nunbird等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Jamaican elaenia
nodes.summary: Jamaican elaenia（Jamaican elaenia，学名 Myiopagis cotta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于森林砍伐，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Jamaican elaenia is native to Jamaica where 75% of its original forest has been cleared and what remains of that is majority second growth. The 25% that remains of original forest remains on high mountains and cliffs and places that are undisturbed by humans or places that prove to be more difficult to get to or uninhabitable land. Likewise, land in Jamaica is also protected by the John Crow national park. Their habitat is also exposed to hurricane damage, use of pesticides, plantations, forest removal, forest fires, and urbanization

links.label: 栖息于
